name: Herbed Caviar Roulade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine sour cream, onion, eggs and pepper.
2. With a small rubber spatula, gently fold in the black caviar.
3. Spread the mixture evenly over one of the crepes, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
4. Beginning at the short end, carefully roll the crepe.
5. To Serve: Using a serrated knife, cut the rolled crepe into 1-1/4 inch slices. Garnish each slice with a sprig of dill and a wedge of lemon. Arrange the slices in the center of individual plates.
